intent: Briefing: 'surveillance capitalism — theory and practice'. (1) Wikipedia — 'Surveillance capitalism' and 'General Data Protection Regulation'. 4+ facts on Shoshana Zuboff's framework and GDPR scope. (2) Reddit /f/technology or /f/privacy — 3+ posts on how users actually change behaviour. The report must: present the theory, map it to 2+ Reddit examples, close with a 'what the public gets wrong' paragraph. Cite.
